nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's i-Standard Win Led to Collaborations with Hudson Mowhake and Abjo
nuggets.text: Pete Rango's career as a producer gained significant momentum when he and his main production partner, Parris Pierce, won i-Standard's Music Producers competition in Miami. This pivotal victory opened doors, leading to Pete meeting the producer duo The Renegades and securing sessions that included a placement on Jesse Boykins III’s EP Bartholomew WAVE I, where he collaborated with Hudson Mowhake and Abjo.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: He competed in i-Standard's Music Producers competition twice with Parris Pierce, once in Atlanta and a second time in Miami. He and Parris Pierce won the i-Standard competition in Miami. After winning the competition, he met producer duo The Renegades. The Renegades' manager, Cazz, liked his style and arranged sessions with different artists for him. He landed a song on Jesse Boykins III's EP Bartholomew WAVE I, collaborating with Hudson Mowhake and Abjo.

nuggets.imageCaption: Pete Rango in the studio, a multi-instrumentalist producer.

nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's XUE Records Aims to 'Disrupt, Uplift, and Make the System Nervous'
nuggets.text: As a culture-builder, Pete Rango's artistry extends beyond the music itself. He founded XUE Records with a clear mission: to disrupt, uplift, and make the system nervous, fostering environments where community, creativity, and technology can truly collide. This philosophy is embedded in his work, driving the innovative spirit behind his captivating pop and indie pop sound.

source.title: rush | PETE RANGO
source.quoteSnippet: As the founder of L.I.V. Corp nonprofit and XUE Records, he aims to disrupt, uplift, and make the system nervous, crafting an alluring fusion of pop and indie pop with contagious melodies and sentimental lyrics. He is known for pushing a DIY spirit into the future, building worlds where community, creativity, and technology collide.

nuggets.imageCaption: Oms at Play by Pete Rango

nuggets.headline: If 'Oms at Play' hits, explore Jai Paul's innovative electronic pop.
nuggets.text: Pete Rango's innovative blend of pop, electronic, and experimental elements, combined with his distinctive melodic approach, draws a compelling parallel to the elusive brilliance of Jai Paul. Both artists defy easy categorization, crafting unique sonic textures and infectious hooks that feel simultaneously futuristic and deeply soulful, pushing the boundaries of what pop music can be.

source.title: Pete Rango - Songs, Events and Music Stats | Viberate.com
source.quoteSnippet: His music is characterized by an alluring fusion of pop and indie pop... He draws inspiration from a variety of musical genres, fusing elements of indie pop into his pop sound... He is open to experimenting with various sounds and pushing the limits of the pop genre.

nuggets.imageCaption: Jai Paul, an influential artist in electronic and indie pop.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is a Colombian artist, producer, and culture-builder based in Richmond, Virginia. He champions a DIY spirit, creating worlds where community, creativity, and technology converge. His music is an alluring fusion of pop and indie pop, known for contagious melodies and sentimental lyrics.
